en: Hey, hey, hey, don't do that! That's my personal cat! Or you gonna tear it...
Yeah, well, maybe you're right, princess.
But I'll let you do the... measuring when you see him tomorrow.
ja: 鏡の自分を見て気づいてほしい
zhTW: 我希望你看鏡子裡的自己時
vi: Tôi hy vọng khi nhìn mình trong gương

en: Mirror, mirror, show her to me. Show me the princess.
Love... ...is for the perfect hair, lipstick liner, shadows, blush...
...to get that prince of a sexy touch. What does he find? Some gender-confused wolf.
So tense. I wanna rub his shoulders. I got it covered, thanks. I don't have anything to rub.
Well, get in line. Look out, princess. Here comes the new me.
Uh, first things first. We need to get you out of those clothes.
